title: Variance Chart
description: Compare adjusted DNA rate differences across grouped dimensions, with confidence intervals and tooltips for each cohort.

inputs.name: dimension_name
inputs.description: Name of the grouping dimension shown as a chart column, for example Sex, Age group, or Specialty.

inputs.name: dimension_order
inputs.description: Sort order for the grouping dimensions from left to right.

inputs.name: dimension_value
inputs.description: Cohort or category label plotted within the dimension and shown in tooltips.

inputs.name: value_order
inputs.description: Optional ordering value for categories within a dimension. Retain for consistent source data ordering.

inputs.name: measure_value
inputs.description: Adjusted DNA rate difference from expected or benchmark value, in percentage points. Positive values appear above zero and negative values below zero.

inputs.name: ci_lower
inputs.description: Lower bound of the confidence interval for the adjusted difference.

inputs.name: ci_upper
inputs.description: Upper bound of the confidence interval for the adjusted difference.

inputs.name: n_spells
inputs.description: Count of appointments represented by the cohort, shown in the tooltip.
